name.value: Golden Lions Figurines of Wondrous Power

description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 11th; Slot none; Price 16,500 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These figurines come in pairs. They become normal adult male lions. If slain in combat, the lions cannot be brought back from statuette form for 1 full week. Otherwise, they can be used once per day for up to 1 hour. They enlarge and shrink upon speaking the command word. CONSTRUCTION Requirements Craft Wondrous Item, animate objects; Cost 8,250 gp
